debug_info.goal:
C D E : CategoryInContext.Cat
F : Hom C D
G : Hom D E
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Functor.mk ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.fst ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst E), opp⟩.fst
      ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.snd ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst E), opp⟩.snd
      (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst E) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd E) (comp F G))
      (fun {X Y} =>
        @CategoryInContext.Functor.homF (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst E) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd E) (comp F G) Y X)
      (fun X => @CategoryInContext.Functor.map_id (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst E) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd E) (comp F G) X)
      ⋯ =
    comp
      (@CategoryInContext.Functor.mk ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.fst ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst D), opp⟩.fst
        ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst C), opp⟩.snd ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst D), opp⟩.snd
        (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst D) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd D) F)
        (fun {X Y} => @CategoryInContext.Functor.homF (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst D) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd D) F Y X)
        (fun X => @CategoryInContext.Functor.map_id (Sigma.fst C) (Sigma.fst D) (Sigma.snd C) (Sigma.snd D) F X) ⋯)
      (@CategoryInContext.Functor.mk ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst D), opp⟩.fst ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst E), opp⟩.fst
        ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst D), opp⟩.snd ⟨Opposite (Sigma.fst E), opp⟩.snd
        (@CategoryInContext.Functor.F (Sigma.fst D) (Sigma.fst E) (Sigma.snd D) (Sigma.snd E) G)
        (fun {X Y} => @CategoryInContext.Functor.homF (Sigma.fst D) (Sigma.fst E) (Sigma.snd D) (Sigma.snd E) G Y X)
        (fun X => @CategoryInContext.Functor.map_id (Sigma.fst D) (Sigma.fst E) (Sigma.snd D) (Sigma.snd E) G X) ⋯)

proof:
simp [Functor.comp, Function.comp]
    <;>
    congr
    <;>
    ext <;>
    simp_all [Function.comp]
    <;>
    congr
    <;>
    ext <;>
    simp_all [Function.comp]
    <;>
    rfl
failed_attempts:
ext1 X Y
    simp_all [comp, Hom, comp_comm, comp_assoc]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [comp]) <;>
    (try simp_all [comp_comm]) <;>
    (try simp_all [comp_assoc]) <;>
    (try simp_all [map_comp]) <;>
    (try simp_all [map_id]) <;>
    (try simp_all [F, G]) <;>
    (try simp_all [C, D, E]) <;>
    (try simp_all [homF]) <;>
    (try simp_all [map_comp]) <;>
    (try simp_all [map_id])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [comp_assoc]) <;>
    (try simp_all [comp_comm]) <;>
    (try simp_all [comp_left_comm])

cases C as ⟨C, _⟩
    cases D as ⟨D, _⟩
    cases E as ⟨E, _⟩
    simp_all [Functor.comp, Prod.ext_iff]
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        congr 1 <;>
        simp_all [Functor.comp, Prod.ext_iff] <;>
        aesop
      })
    <;>
    (try
      {
        aesop
      })

simp [C, D, E]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Functor.comp])
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp_apply])
    <;>
    (try rfl)

intro f
  exact f h

def opmap {C D : Type*} [C'] [D'] (f : C → D) : C' → D' := by
  intro h
  exact h

def op_map {C D : Type*} [C'] [D'] (f : C → D) : C' → D' := by
  intro h
  exact h

def op_map_2 {C D : Type*} [C'] [D'] (f : C → D) : C' → D' := by
  intro h
  exact h

def op_comp_aux {C D E : Type*} [C'] [D'] [E'] (f : C → D) (g : D → E) : C → E := by
  intro h
  exact g (f h)

def opcomp_def{C D E : Cat} (F : Hom C D) (G : Hom D E) :
    Hom C E :=
  comp (opmap F) (opmap G)

apply_fun (fun f => (f : Hom (⟨_, _⟩ : Cat) (⟨_, _⟩ : Cat))) at *
    <;> simp_all [Functor.mk, Filtrant]
    <;> try rfl
    <;> try simp_all [Prod.ext_iff]
    <;> try ext <;> simp_all [Function.funext_iff]
    <;> try aesop

ext X Y
    simp [Category.comp]
    <;>
    (try rfl) <;>
    (try simp_all [Fintype.card_fin]) <;>
    (try aesop)

have h₁ : @Functor.mk ⟨Opposite C.1, @Category.opp (Opposite C.1) C.2⟩.1 ⟨Opposite E.1, @Category.opp (Opposite E.1) E.2⟩.1 ⟨Opposite C.1, @Category.opp (Opposite C.1) C.2⟩.2 ⟨Opposite E.1, @Category.opp (Opposite E.1) E.2⟩.2 (@Functor.F C.1 E.1 C.2 E.2 (comp F G)) (fun {X Y} => @Functor.homF C.1 E.1 C.2 E.2 (comp F G) Y X) (fun X => @Functor.map_id C.1 E.1 C.2 E.2 (comp F G) X) (fun {X Y Z} f g => @Functor.map_comp C.1 E.1 C.2 E.2 (comp F G) f g) = comp (letI := C.2; letI := D.2; @Functor.mk ⟨Opposite C.1, @Category.opp (Opposite C.1) C.2⟩.1 ⟨Opposite D.1, @Category.opp (Opposite D.1) D.2⟩.1 ⟨Opposite C.1, @Category.opp (Opposite C.1) C.2⟩.2 ⟨Opposite D.1, @Category.opp (Opposite D.1) D.2⟩.2 (@Functor.F C.1 D.1 C.2 D.2 F) (fun {X Y} => @Functor.homF C.1 D.1 C.2 D.2 F Y X) (fun X => @Functor.map_id C.1 D.1 C.2 D.2 F X) (fun {X Y Z} f g => @Functor.map_comp C.1 D.1 C.2 D.2 F f g)) (letI := D.2; letI := E.2; @Functor.mk ⟨Opposite D.1, @Category.opp (Opposite D.1) D.2⟩.1 ⟨Opposite E.1, @Category.opp (Opposite E.1) E.2⟩.1 ⟨Opposite D.1, @Category.opp (Opposite D.1) D.2⟩.2 ⟨Opposite E.1, @Category.opp (Opposite E.1) E.2⟩.2 (@Functor.F D.1 E.1 D.2 E.2 G) (fun {X Y} => @Functor.homF D.1 E.1 D.2 E.2 G Y X) (fun X => @Functor.map_id D.1 E.1 D.2 E.2 G X) (fun {X Y Z} f g => @Functor.map_comp D.1 E.1 D.2 E.2 G f g)) := by
      ext <;> simp_all [Functor.ext_iff, comp]
      <;> aesop
    ext <;> simp_all [Functor.ext_iff, comp]
    <;> aesop

cases C with
    | mk C Cstr =>
    cases D with
    | mk D Dstr =>
    cases E with
    | mk E Estr =>
      dsimp [Functor.comp] at *
      <;> simp_all [Isomorphism]
      <;> aesop
successful_attempts:
simp [Functor.comp, Function.comp]
    <;>
    congr
    <;>
    ext <;>
    simp_all [Function.comp]
    <;>
    congr
    <;>
    ext <;>
    simp_all [Function.comp]
    <;>
    rfl

dsimp [Functor.comp]
    <;>
    (try rfl) <;>
    (try simp_all [Function.comp, Category.comp]) <;>
    (try ext <;> rfl) <;>
    (try aesop)

cases C <;> cases D <;> cases E <;> simp_all [Functor.comp]
    <;>
    (try { intros; simp_all [Function.funext_iff] }) <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>
    (try { rfl }) <;>
    (try { simp_all [Category.id] }) <;>
    (try { simp_all [Function.comp_def] })
